home.hero_subtitle: Predict group standings, build your knockout bracket, and compete with friends in private leagues.
home.feature_groups_desc: Drag & drop 48 teams across 12 groups and pick your winners.
home.feature_bracket_desc: Auto-build your bracket from group results and predict the champion.
home.feature_leagues_desc: Create a league, invite friends with a code, and track the leaderboard.
home.feature_heatmap_desc: See who everyone else is picking as champion across all predictions.
home.feature_daily_desc: Answer one question per day about the tournament and earn points.
home.footer_disclaimer: Unofficial fan project. Not affiliated with FIFA.

groups.title: Group Stage
groups.subtitle: Drag teams to rank them in each group
groups.login_prompt: Log in to save your predictions

bracket.title: Knockout Bracket
bracket.subtitle: Click a team to advance them to the next round

leagues.title: Leagues
leagues.no_leagues: No leagues yet. Create one or join!

daily.title: Daily Challenge
daily.subtitle: One question per day. Answer correctly to earn points!
daily.come_back: Come back tomorrow for a new question
daily.result_pending: Result will be revealed at end of day
